user.title: Inverter Setup
user.description: Configure your inverter type and grid voltage.

data_description.inverter_type: Select 'Hybrid' if your inverter has a battery connected.
data_description.grid_voltage: Your local grid voltage (typically 230V in Europe, 120V in North America).

sensors.title: Sensor Mapping
sensors.description: Map your Home Assistant sensors to PV Excess Control. You must provide either a Grid Export sensor or a Combined Import/Export sensor.

data_description.pv_power: Sensor that reports your current PV production (W or kW — automatically converted).
data_description.grid_export: Sensor that reports power exported to the grid (W or kW — automatically converted).
data_description.import_export_power: Combined sensor where positive = export, negative = import (W or kW — automatically converted). Use this instead of Grid Export if your inverter provides a combined sensor.
data_description.load_power: Sensor that reports your total household load (W or kW — automatically converted).
data_description.battery_soc: Sensor that reports battery state of charge in percent.
data_description.battery_power: Combined sensor where positive = charging, negative = discharging (W or kW — automatically converted). Use this OR the separate charge/discharge sensors below.
data_description.battery_charge_power: Sensor that reports battery charging power (W or kW — automatically converted). Use with Battery Discharge Sensor as an alternative to the combined Battery Power Sensor.
data_description.battery_discharge_power: Sensor that reports battery discharging power (W or kW — automatically converted). Use with Battery Charge Sensor as an alternative to the combined Battery Power Sensor.
data_description.battery_capacity: Total usable battery capacity in kilowatt-hours.

energy.title: Energy Pricing
energy.description: Configure your electricity tariff for smart scheduling.

data_description.tariff_provider: Select your electricity price provider integration.
data_description.price_sensor: Select the sensor entity that provides the current electricity price. For Tibber, use the price sensor. For Octopus, select the electricity price sensor. For Awattar/Nordpool, select the spot price sensor.
data_description.cheap_price_threshold: Price below which electricity is considered cheap.
data_description.battery_charge_price_threshold: Price below which battery charging from grid is allowed.
data_description.feed_in_tariff: Price received per kWh for energy exported to the grid.
data_description.feed_in_tariff_sensor: Optional sensor for dynamic feed-in tariff (overrides static value)

forecast.title: Solar Forecast
forecast.description: Configure solar production forecast for intelligent planning.

data_description.forecast_provider: Select your solar forecast provider integration.
data_description.forecast_sensor: Select the sensor entity that provides the solar forecast. For Solcast, select the forecast sensor that contains detailedForecast data (e.g., sensor.solcast_pv_forecast_forecast_today).
data_description.forecast_tomorrow_sensor: Optional sensor for tomorrow's total forecast (e.g., sensor.solcast_pv_forecast_forecast_tomorrow). Enables weather pre-planning.

battery.title: Battery Strategy
battery.description: Configure how your battery should be managed alongside appliance control.

data_description.battery_strategy: How to prioritize battery charging vs. appliance control.
data_description.battery_target_soc: Desired battery charge level to reach by target time.
data_description.battery_target_time: Time by which the battery should reach the target SoC.
data_description.allow_grid_charging: Allow charging the battery from the grid during cheap tariff periods.
data_description.battery_max_discharge_entity: Entity to control maximum battery discharge power.
data_description.battery_max_discharge_default: Default maximum discharge power when no override is active.
data_description.min_battery_soc: When battery SoC drops below this threshold, all non-essential appliances are shed and battery discharge is blocked. Leave empty to disable.

settings.title: Global Settings
settings.description: Configure global behavior, update intervals, and notification preferences.

data_description.export_limit: Maximum power allowed to export to the grid (0 = no limit).
data_description.off_threshold: Grid draw (negative watts) tolerated before the optimizer starts shedding appliances. Default: -50 W.
data_description.controller_interval: How often the controller evaluates and adjusts appliances.
data_description.planner_interval: How often the planner recalculates the daily schedule.
data_description.plan_influence: Controls how the 24-hour planner influences real-time decisions. 'Light' lowers activation thresholds when the plan expects excess. 'Plan follows' actively schedules appliances based on forecast and tariff predictions. 'None' disables plan influence (pure reactive control).
data_description.enable_preemption: When enabled, the optimizer can shed lower-priority appliances to start higher-priority ones that lack sufficient excess power. Disable to use simple priority-based allocation only.
data_description.notify_appliance_on: Send a notification when an appliance is turned on by the integration.
data_description.notify_appliance_off: Send a notification when an appliance is turned off by the integration.
data_description.notify_daily_summary: Send a daily summary notification at midnight with energy stats.

error.invalid_voltage: Grid voltage must be between 100V and 500V.
error.no_grid_sensor: You must configure at least one of: Grid Export sensor, Combined Import/Export sensor, or Load Power sensor.
error.missing_price_sensor: A price sensor is required when a tariff provider is selected.
error.missing_forecast_sensor: A forecast sensor is required when a forecast provider is selected.
error.invalid_soc: State of charge must be between 0% and 100%.

abort.already_configured: PV Excess Control is already configured.

appliance.title: Appliance
appliance.description: Add an appliance to be controlled based on excess PV power or cheap grid tariffs.

user.title: Add Appliance
user.description: Configure the basic information and power profile for this appliance.

data_description.appliance_name: A friendly name for this appliance.
data_description.appliance_entity: The switch or controllable entity for this appliance.
data_description.appliance_priority: Lower number = higher priority. Appliances with higher priority get excess power first.
data_description.nominal_power: The rated power consumption of this appliance in watts.
data_description.actual_power_entity: Optional sensor that reports actual power consumption (W or kW — automatically converted).
data_description.phases: Number of electrical phases this appliance uses.

current.title: Dynamic Current Settings
current.description: Configure dynamic current control for variable-power appliances like EV chargers.

data_description.dynamic_current: Enable to control this appliance by adjusting its current rather than simple on/off.
data_description.current_entity: Number entity to set the charging current.
data_description.current_step: Resolution of current adjustments. 0.1A for fine-grained control, 1.0A for whole-amp steps. Match this to your device's supported resolution.
data_description.ev_soc_entity: Sensor that reports the EV battery state of charge.
data_description.ev_connected_entity: Binary sensor that indicates whether the EV is connected.
data_description.ev_target_soc: Stop charging when EV reaches this state of charge (%)

constraints.title: Constraints & Grid Settings
constraints.description: Configure runtime constraints, grid supplementation, and big consumer settings.

data_description.switch_interval: Minimum time between switching this appliance on and off.
data_description.averaging_window: Custom averaging window for excess power calculation. Shorter windows respond faster but may cause more switching. Leave empty to use the global default (1800 seconds / 30 minutes).
data_description.on_only: If enabled, this appliance will only be turned on, never automatically turned off.
data_description.protect_from_preemption: When enabled, this appliance will never be shed to make room for a higher-priority appliance.
data_description.min_daily_runtime: Minimum number of minutes this appliance should run per day.
data_description.max_daily_runtime: Maximum number of minutes this appliance may run per day.
data_description.max_daily_activations: Maximum number of times this appliance may be turned on per day. Leave empty for unlimited.
data_description.on_threshold: Extra excess power (watts) required above the appliance's minimum to trigger activation. Leave empty for default (200 W standard, 50 W dynamic current).
data_description.schedule_deadline: Time by which the minimum daily runtime must be completed.
data_description.start_after: Earliest time this appliance may operate. Leave empty for no restriction.
data_description.end_before: Latest time this appliance may operate. Leave empty for no restriction.
data_description.allow_grid_supplement: Allow using grid power to supplement PV excess for this appliance.
data_description.max_grid_power: Maximum watts to draw from the grid when supplementing.
data_description.is_big_consumer: Mark as big consumer to control battery discharge when active. Set 'Battery Discharge Override' below to define the discharge limit.
data_description.battery_discharge_override: Override battery max discharge power (in watts) when this appliance is active.
data_description.requires_appliance: Select an appliance that must be running before this one can start. E.g., a pool heat pump requires the pool pump.
data_description.helper_only: When enabled, this appliance only runs when another appliance lists it as its required dependency. It will never run on its own based on excess power.

reconfigure_basic.title: Edit Appliance
reconfigure_basic.description: Update the basic information and power profile for this appliance.

data_description.appliance_name: A friendly name for this appliance.
data_description.appliance_entity: The switch or controllable entity for this appliance.
data_description.appliance_priority: Lower number = higher priority. Appliances with higher priority get excess power first.
data_description.nominal_power: The rated power consumption of this appliance in watts.
data_description.actual_power_entity: Optional sensor that reports actual power consumption (W or kW — automatically converted).
data_description.phases: Number of electrical phases this appliance uses.

data_description.dynamic_current: Enable to control this appliance by adjusting its current rather than simple on/off.
data_description.current_entity: Number entity to set the charging current.
data_description.current_step: Resolution of current adjustments. 0.1A for fine-grained control, 1.0A for whole-amp steps. Match this to your device's supported resolution.
data_description.ev_soc_entity: Sensor that reports the EV battery state of charge.
data_description.ev_connected_entity: Binary sensor that indicates whether the EV is connected.
data_description.ev_target_soc: Stop charging when EV reaches this state of charge (%)

reconfigure_constraints.title: Edit Constraints & Grid Settings
reconfigure_constraints.description: Update runtime constraints, grid supplementation, and big consumer settings.

data_description.switch_interval: Minimum time between switching this appliance on and off.
data_description.averaging_window: Custom averaging window for excess power calculation. Shorter windows respond faster but may cause more switching. Leave empty to use the global default (1800 seconds / 30 minutes).
data_description.on_only: If enabled, this appliance will only be turned on, never automatically turned off.
data_description.protect_from_preemption: When enabled, this appliance will never be shed to make room for a higher-priority appliance.
data_description.min_daily_runtime: Minimum number of minutes this appliance should run per day.
data_description.max_daily_runtime: Maximum number of minutes this appliance may run per day.
data_description.max_daily_activations: Maximum number of times this appliance may be turned on per day. Leave empty for unlimited.
data_description.on_threshold: Extra excess power (watts) required above the appliance's minimum to trigger activation. Leave empty for default (200 W standard, 50 W dynamic current).
data_description.schedule_deadline: Time by which the minimum daily runtime must be completed.
data_description.start_after: Earliest time this appliance may operate. Leave empty for no restriction.
data_description.end_before: Latest time this appliance may operate. Leave empty for no restriction.
data_description.allow_grid_supplement: Allow using grid power to supplement PV excess for this appliance.
data_description.max_grid_power: Maximum watts to draw from the grid when supplementing.
data_description.is_big_consumer: Mark as big consumer to control battery discharge when active. Set 'Battery Discharge Override' below to define the discharge limit.
data_description.battery_discharge_override: Override battery max discharge power (in watts) when this appliance is active.
data_description.requires_appliance: Select an appliance that must be running before this one can start. E.g., a pool heat pump requires the pool pump.
data_description.helper_only: When enabled, this appliance only runs when another appliance lists it as its required dependency. It will never run on its own based on excess power.

error.missing_entity: An appliance entity must be selected.
error.invalid_power: Nominal power must be greater than 0.
error.missing_current_entity: A current control entity is required when dynamic current is enabled.
error.invalid_current_range: Minimum current must be less than maximum current.
error.invalid_runtime_range: Minimum daily runtime must be less than or equal to maximum daily runtime.
error.missing_max_grid_power: Maximum grid power is required when grid supplementation is enabled.
error.suggest_big_consumer: This appliance draws 3000W or more. Consider enabling 'Big Consumer' to prevent battery discharge when active. Submit again to keep current setting.
error.circular_dependency: Circular dependency: the selected appliance already depends on this one.
error.helper_only_with_requires: An appliance cannot be both a helper and have its own dependency. Either clear 'Requires Appliance' or uncheck 'Run Only as Helper'.

abort.reconfigure_not_supported: Reconfigure is not supported on this HA version. Please delete and re-add the appliance.

data_description.controller_interval: How often the controller evaluates and adjusts appliances.

data_description.plan_influence: Controls how the 24-hour planner influences real-time decisions. 'Light' lowers activation thresholds when the plan expects excess.
